endpoints.name: POST /v2/{instance}:detachLun
endpoints.description: Detach LUN from Instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{location}/instanceProvisioningSettings:fetch
endpoints.description: Get instance provisioning settings for a given project. This is hidden method used by UI only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{location}/networks:listNetworkUsage
endpoints.description: List all Networks (and used IPs for each Network) in the vendor account associated with the specified project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Returns the specified snapshot resource. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a volume snapshot. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Update details of a single storage volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:disableInteractiveSerialConsole
endpoints.description: Disable the interactive serial console feature on an instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:enableInteractiveSerialConsole
endpoints.description: Enable the interactive serial console feature on an instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:evict
endpoints.description: Skips lun's cooloff and deletes it now. Lun must be in cooloff state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:rename
endpoints.description: RenameVolume sets a new name for a volume. Use with caution, previous names become immediately invalidated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:reset
endpoints.description: Perform an ungraceful, hard reset on a server. Equivalent to shutting the power off and then turning it back on.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:start
endpoints.description: Starts a server that was shutdown.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:stop
endpoints.description: Stop a running server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/instances
endpoints.description: List servers in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/instances
endpoints.description: Create an Instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/luns
endpoints.description: List storage volume luns for given storage volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/networks
endpoints.description: List network in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/nfsShares
endpoints.description: List NFS shares.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/nfsShares
endpoints.description: Create an NFS share.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/provisioningConfigs
endpoints.description: Create new ProvisioningConfig.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/provisioningConfigs:submit
endpoints.description: Submit a provisiong configuration for a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/provisioningQuotas
endpoints.description: List the budget details to provision resources on a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/snapshots
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of snapshots for the specified volume. Returns a response with an empty list of snapshots if called for a non-boot volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/snapshots
endpoints.description: Takes a snapshot of a boot volume. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/sshKeys
endpoints.description: Lists the public SSH keys registered for the specified project. These SSH keys are used only for the interactive serial console feature.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/sshKeys
endpoints.description: Register a public SSH key in the specified project for use with the interactive serial console feature.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/volumes
endpoints.description: List storage volumes in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{volumeSnapshot}:restoreVolumeSnapshot
endpoints.description: Uses the specified snapshot to restore its parent volume. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VOLUMESNAPSHOT}} with a real volumesnapshot.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{volume}:resize
endpoints.description: Emergency Volume resize.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VOLUME}} with a real volume.
